name: Transkei (1976–1994)

colors.symbolism: the lower stripe and the land

description: Three horizontal stripes — ochre/orange (top), white, and green — with the white stripe slightly narrower.
history: Flag of Transkei, the first of the four nominally independent 'Bantustans' created by apartheid-era South Africa (independence declared 26 October 1976) as a 'homeland' for the Xhosa people. Internationally unrecognised. Reincorporated into South Africa in 1994.
